$schema_note: Reusable scale-appropriate validation/reconciliation patterns bridging the big-data layer to SQL and readiness. Each pattern is a distributed check that produces evidence; it does not gate. IDs are stable (references/id-conventions.md). Some patterns reuse Python-layer concepts (PY-*).

patterns.name: Row-count parity vs source (distributed)
patterns.check: Loaded/output row count equals the source/expected count, computed as a distributed aggregate (never collect()).

patterns.name: Grain uniqueness at scale
patterns.check: Global distinct grain-key count equals row count (duplicates may hide across partitions).
patterns.on_fail: Global dedup on grain key; check producer retries (BD-CN-017, BD-CN-061).

patterns.name: Control-total parity vs SQL
patterns.check: Additive control totals (quantity, revenue) match the SQL/warehouse layer for the same period/filter.
patterns.tolerance: declared (0 for counts; epsilon for currency)

patterns.name: Aggregation conservation (distributed)
patterns.check: Additive measure total after groupby equals total before (distributed compute).
patterns.on_fail: Dropped null keys or upstream fan-out; see aggregation checklist.

patterns.name: Join row-count reconciliation
patterns.check: Post-join row count equals expectation from declared cardinality.
patterns.on_fail: Fan-out or skew-related drop/dup; see join-skew checklist.

patterns.name: Idempotency rerun check
patterns.check: Running the job twice over the same slice yields identical output (row count + control totals unchanged).
patterns.on_fail: Switch append to partition-overwrite/merge; add key dedup (BD-CN-058, BD-CN-061).

patterns.name: Distinct-count method disclosure
patterns.check: Each distinct-count output is labeled exact or approximate, with error bound if approximate.
patterns.on_fail: Switch to exact where precise reconciliation required (BD-CN-045).

patterns.name: Referential integrity at scale
patterns.check: Every foreign key value exists in its dimension (orphan count via distributed anti-join).
patterns.on_fail: Report orphans as findings; do not auto-create dimension rows.

patterns.name: Partition-pruning verification
patterns.check: Filtered queries actually prune partitions/columns in the plan (not full scan).
patterns.on_fail: Make filter pushable / fix layout (BD-CN-032, BD-CN-055).
